programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness försöker Rob, Steelo och Nina Agdal ta reda på varför 'Grabbar älskar farligheter', rulllar mat-tärningen och förlorar i 'Det har gått ut' och njuter av vyn från de billiga platserna i 'Läktarbeteende'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness får Rob och Sterling sällskap av Teala Dunn för att diskutera hur man gör entré i 'Cool entré', får tyst på hatare i 'Tvivla inte' innan de kollar in biltrender i 'Vinklade däck'.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: Yaz & Chloe Brockett är öppenhjärtiga, medan Finn och Paige brottas med att bo tillsammans i villan. Ett nytt ex skakar om ett par, och det blir för mycket för en kändis.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It’s a journey into antiquity with glamorous historians Suzannah Lipscomb and Kate Williams. Paired with experts David Harper and Catherine Southon they Road Trip from Bletchley in Buckinghamshire to an auction in London. There’s also opportunity to hear how Mrs Beeton became the first ‘domestic Goddess’ and why Luton played a critical role in the fashion world when hats were de rigueur daily wear. David and Suzannah gamble on a giant ant while Catherine and Kate plump for a very large tea urn.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rock'n roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Grégoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of an Italian painter, Caravaggio. You will discover his labour with Bacchus, Mary Magdalene or Christ at the Column.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Italien painter, Sandro Botticelli.You will discover his labour with Abundance or autumn, The story of virginia, Venus and Mars.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cézanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and won't miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cézanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and won't miss a single detail.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: La bibliothèque Sainte-Geneviève, est une très grande date de l'architecture et des bibliothèques. Première bibliothèque universitaire, ouverte à tous, c'est avec elle qu'est né le concept de bibliothèque publique. En rupture avec le courant néo-classique dominant au milieu du XIX° siècle en Europe, Henri Labrouste élève à Paris, au coeur du quartier latin, un bâtiment compact et dépouillé. Dans lequel se marient la pierre et un matériau industriel, le fer, jusque là réservé aux ponts ou aux gares. Il est ici exhibé et magnifié dans la grande salle de lecture. Ce parti pris stupéfia les contemporains de Labrouste et fut salué par Le Corbusier comme le premier pas vers « l'architecture moderne».

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En juin 2017, une grande exposition a ouvert à Paris au musée d’Orsay. Pour la première fois, cette exposition a réuni tous les portraits de Cézanne. Cela a été l’occasion d’analyser l’œuvre de Cézanne à l’aide d’experts internationaux et de parcourir les salles de la National Portrait Gallery de Londres et de la National Gallery of Art de Washington.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The Impressionists are the most popular group in art history - millions flock every year to marvel at their masterpieces. But, to begin with, they were scorned, penniless outsiders. 1874 was the year that changed everything; the first Impressionists, “hungry for independence”, broke the mould by holding their own exhibition outside official channels. Impressionism was born and the art world was changed forever.What led to that first groundbreaking show 150 years ago? Who were the maverick personalities that wielded their brushes in such a radical and provocative way? The spectacular Musée d’Orsay exhibition brings fresh eyes to this extraordinary tale of passion and rebellion. The story is told not by historians and curators but in the words of those who witnessed the dawn of Impressionism: the artists, press and people of Paris, 1874. See the show that changed everything on the big screen.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Painting the Modern Garden - Monet to Matisse
programme.desc: Passionné d’horticulture, Monet reste sans conteste le maître de la peinture de jardins dans l’histoire de l’art, mais il n’était pas seul. Des artistes tels que Van Gogh, Bonnard, Picasso et Matisse ont utilisé le jardin comme thème fort de leur œuvre. Ces grands artistes, ainsi que bien d’autres noms célèbres, sont rassemblés dans une exposition innovante du Cleveland Museum of Art et de la Royal Gallery of Arts de Londres. De l’exposition elle-même à la beauté des jardins d’artistes comme celui de Monet à Giverny, nous partons en voyage pour découvrir comment le jardin moderne était utilisé pour explorer de nouvelles idées radicales et merveilleuses.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cézanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and won't miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Museo del Prado in Madrid holds one of the biggest collections of paintings in the world. The “Garden of Delights”, a triptych by Hieronymus Bosch, is one of its jewels. But naturally it is the Spanish School which predominates, with masterpieces by Velasquez and Goya. Look at Velasquez’s famous “Las Meninas” in which the painter portrays himself next to the Infanta and her followers. And admire the sensuous beauty of Goya’s “La Maja Desnuda” or the political force of “El Tres de Mayo”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedy legend Jennifer Saunders and best pal, top actress Patricia Potter take to the road on a humdinger of a trip. Joined by veteran antiquers Phillip Serrell and Mark Stacey they shop in Berkshire, Hampshire and Oxfordshire before heading for an auction in Greenwich, London. Jennifer and Phil detour to hear about Fred Karno, the man credited with inventing slapstick comedy. While Patricia and Mark learn how a surgeon from Reading used his incredible sense of smell to successfully treat soldiers injured in World War One.And, Phil gets custard pied – what’s not to love?

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Charlotte Le Percin, cultural mediator at the Cernuschi Museum in Paris. She is the intermediary between the works and the visitors. Her audience ranges from kindergarteners to pensioners. With her, we will discover the life of a guide in a museum.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.sub-title: The City of Architecture and Heritage
programme.desc: The City of Architecture and Heritage is a place dedicated to the art of building, its challenges, its eras, its styles, and its great masters. How are the major buildings of our time and of the past designed? Why and for whom were they built? The museum brings together a collection that allows you to navigate through centuries of architecture, to admire masterpieces usually out of sight, and to understand the great evolutions over the ages, from the 12th century to the present day.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Fanny Bouyagui, visual artist and director of the association Art Point M, and who is at the origin of the Braderie de l'Art in Roubaix. Since 1991, this event welcomes dozens of artists with a single motto, create from recycled objects. But before the arrival of the public, Fanny must make sure that certain rules are respected. We will accompany her throughout this very busy day.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: Throughout the first half of the 20th century, the Marmottan Museum was a center of First Empire art. We go there to admire the magnificent collection of Paul Marmottan, and to relive the nostalgia of the great Napoleonic era, its imperial splendor, its past glories. But little by little, the Marmottan Museum is becoming a showcase for another style of art, less classic, more avant-garde: impressionism. In 1993, the museum changed its name: it became the Musée Marmottan-Monet.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « J’envie les Japonais », écrivait Van Gogh à son frère, Théo. Grâce à l’exposition sur laquelle est basé ce film, « Van Gogh et le Japon », au musée Van Gogh d’Amsterdam, on comprend pourquoi. Bien que Vincent van Gogh n’ait jamais visité le Japon, il reste le pays qui a eu le plus d’influence sur lui et son œuvre. En se rendant dans les galeries d’art japonais à Paris et en créant sa propre image du Japon après des recherches approfondies, des collections d’estampes et de longues discussions avec d’autres artistes, la découverte des œuvres japonaises entraîna la carrière de Van Gogh dans une nouvelle direction très excitante.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Les impressionnistes - et l'homme qui les a créés
programme.desc: Ce sont les artistes les plus populaires du monde. Les œuvres de Cézanne, Monet, Degas et leurs compatriotes représentent des richesses inestimables. Mais qui étaient-ils vraiment ? Comment et pourquoi ont-ils révolutionné l’histoire de l’art ? Qu’est-ce qui se cache derrière leur succès intemporel ? Pour répondre à ces questions, le documentaire a obtenu un accès unique à une grande exposition mettant l’accent sur le collectionneur d’art parisien du 19ème siècle, Paul Durand-Ruel, l’expert des Impressionnistes qui prit la décision courageuse d’exposer les Impressionnistes à New York en 1886 et ainsi introduire la société américaine à la peinture française moderne.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux amies de la scène et de la télévision, Ruth Madoc et Su Pollard, connues pour leurs apparitions dans la sitcom Hi-De-Hi, partent à la chasse aux antiquités avec Phil Serrell et Raj Bisram. Partis de Monmouth, ville frontalière du Pays de Galles, ils se rendent à Congleton, dans le Cheshire, pour une vente aux enchères.Ruth découvre également l'incroyable infirmière du XIXe siècle - et ce n'est pas Florence Nightingale - tandis que Su visite l'ancienne ville romaine de Caerleon et trouve le temps d'affronter Phil dans un amphithéâtre.Et Su tente de résoudre un vieux mystère... Phil porte-t-il une perruque ?

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In each episode of the decisive moment, we welcome a photographer whom we have asked to select three photos that have marked their life and their career. Whether they are reporters, portraitists or fashion photographers, they all have the same passion and will share it with us.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: Fernand Khnopff - The master of the enigma
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Fernand Khnopff - The master of the enigma" at the Petit Palais in Paris. The work that introduces the visit of the exhibition dedicated to this amazing artist is called "silence". The artist represented landscapes of his childhood in the Ardennes in France. But he also painted portraits, paintings representing his mother as his painting entitled "Listening to Schumann".

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private tour takes you on a tour of the "Picasso Masterpieces" exhibition at the National Picasso Museum in Paris. This exhibition tells the story of how Picasso's works became important collector's items for everyone. Picasso himself questioned the notion of "masterpieces". He concluded that there is not only one way to make a work a true masterpiece. During this private tour you will be able to discover or rediscover some of his works such as "The young ladies of Avignon" or "Women at their toilet".

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Masterpieces Unveiled
programme.desc: During the 20th century, the fame of the ‘Mona Lisa’ spread, establishing itself as the most iconic and recognisable painting of all time. It has been exploited in every sphere of culture and advertising, to the extent that its status as a pop icon has almost overshadowed its artistic value and historical significance. But if we consider Leonardo’s achievements as a pioneering craftsman and the unprecedented qualities of this work, the ‘Mona Lisa’ truly marked a turning point in portraiture. A masterpiece that set new standards in its day and which, five hundred years later, has become the very symbol of art.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Grégoire Lacroix, director of the antique decents department of the auction house, Aguttes. We meet him at the Hôtel Drouot in Paris, the largest auction house in the world. For several months, he has been working on two important sales and we are going to accompany him during the last hours of preparations.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: A l'époque des fastes, Coorte passait des heures à travailler sur ses natures mortes austères composées d'une botte d'asperges, de trois pêches ou d'un bol de fraises. Comment se fait-il qu'il faille huit couleurs différentes pour approcher le blanc des asperges de Coorte ? Et pourquoi sont-elles si transparentes ? La recherche des réponses conduit l'équipe dans une petite église et chez un cultivateur d'asperges dans les provinces néerlandaises, ce qui conduit à une découverte spéciale dans un laboratoire de chimie.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Red, art and utopia in the land of the Soviets" at the Grand Palais in Paris. This exhibition focuses on how the communist project generated specific art forms throughout the Soviet period and more precisely from the October Revolution until the death of Stalin in 1953.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « Les Tournesols » sont parmi les tableaux de Van Gogh les plus célèbres. Le musée Van Gogh à Amsterdam a consacré une exposition à ces œuvres et « Exhibition on screen », qui a eu un accès exclusif à l’événement, nous guide à travers l’exposition pour enquêter sur les mystères qui entourent ces tableaux. Le film nous amènera également à Tokyo, Philadelphie, Londres et Munich pour suivre les 5 principales œuvres de l’exposition.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Canaletto and the Art of Venice
programme.desc: Canaletto et l’art de Venise, un voyage en immersion dans la vie et l’art du célèbre peintre de Venise. Aucun artiste n’a su mieux capturer l’essence et le charme de cette ville que Giovanni Antonio Canal, plus connu sous le nom de Canaletto. La remarquable collection regroupe plus de 200 tableaux, dessins et eaux-fortes nous permet de partir à la découverte du talent artistique de Canaletto, de ses contemporains et de la ville qu’il a su reproduire avec génie. Le film ouvre également les portes de deux résidences royales officielles, Buckingham Palace et le château de Windsor, pour nous en apprendre plus sur l’artiste et sur Joseph Smith, l’homme qui a fait découvrir Canaletto à la Grande-Bretagne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Après deux ans d’exposition itinérante, en 2015 "La Jeune Fille à la perle” est retournée au musée Mauritshuis de La Haye. Du haut de ses 350 ans, l’éternelle Jeune Fille a toujours su conserver son aura de mystère et son charme. La preuve, c’est le nombre de curieux (1,2 millions) qui ont accouru pour l’apercevoir lors de son séjour au Japon. Le documentaire cherche à découvrir les nombreuses énigmes de cet extraordinaire tableau et de son créateur mystérieux - Vermeer. Qui était cette fille ? Pourquoi et comment Vermeer a-t-il peint ce tableau ? Venez voyager dans le temps pour découvrir Johannes Vermeer, visiter le charmant musée de La Haye et répondre à toutes ces questions.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Jean-François Millet (1814 - 1875) was a 19th-century French realist painter, pastellist, engraver and draughtsman. He is best known for his realistic rural scenes.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: François Boucher (1703-1770) is the archetypal French Rococo painter. He paints mythological themes tinged with gallantry, for example in the beautiful “Diane resting after her Bath” at the Louvre Museum. His patron was Madame de Pompadour, whose portrait he painted many times. Influenced by the Enlightenment movement, he devoted himself to Chinese themes (“The Chinese Garden”), to pastoral landscape (“Charms of Country Life”) and to a certain sensual Orientalism (“Brown Odalisque”).Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Two favourite Blue Peter presenters Sarah Greene and Peter Duncan are in the company of Natasha Raskin and Catherine Southon as they hunt for antiques around Surrey, Hertfordshire and North West London. Peter detours to learn how hockey became a popular sport the world over while keen aviator Sarah sees how the Battle of Britain was won. An incredible haul of antiques, including chimney pots, Pinocchio and a pair of African fertility figures, go under the gavel at an auction in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rock'n roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Grégoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Italien painter, Leonardo da Vinci.You will discover his labour with the Joconde, Salvator Mundi, The Cène.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Netherlands painter, Rembrandt.You will discover his labour with The night round, the return of the prodigal son, Danaé.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The spectacular sculptures and paintings of Michelangelo seem so familiar to us, but what do we really know about this renaissance genius? Who was this ambitious and passionate man? A virtuoso craftsman, Michelangelo’s artistry is evident in everything he touched. Beautiful and diverse works such as the towering statue of David, the deeply moving Pietà in the Papal Basilica of St. Peter and his tour-de-force, the Sistine Chapel ceiling still leave us breathless today.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Il y a une grande simplicité et un réalisme troublant dans les figures du peintre lorrain Georges de La Tour (1593-1652). Marqué par les œuvres du Caravage, il a produit des œuvres aux tonalités claires, comme la fameuse composition du Tricheur à l’as de carreau, mais aussi de nombreuses scènes nocturnes, au clair-obscur saisissant, simplement éclairées par la lumière d’une chandelle, comme dans Le nouveau-né ou l’Adoration des bergers actuellement conservé au Louvre à Paris.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cézanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and won't miss a single detail.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.sub-title: La bande dessinée en trois cases
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Dominique Perrault, creator of the BNF and the Olympic Velodrome in Berlin, takes up a concept that is dear to him: the disappearance of architecture. The urban dimension and territorial organization take precedence over the built object. Landscape takes precedence over architecture.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Degas : une passion de la perfection
programme.desc: Exhibition on screen nous emmène à travers les rues de Paris puis au cœur d’une superbe exposition au Fitzwilliam Museum de Cambridge, dont l’impressionnante collection d’œuvres de Degas est la plus représentative de Grande-Bretagne. Ayant bénéficié d’un accès exclusif à une grande variété d’œuvres rares, le film raconte l’histoire fascinante de la quête de perfection de Degas à travers l’expérimentation de nouvelles techniques et les leçons apprises en étudiant les grands maîtres.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Cette exposition très attendue à la Royal Academy of Arts était la toute première rétrospective consacrée au portrait d'Édouard Manet. Couvrant l'ensemble de la carrière de cet artiste énigmatique et parfois controversé, l'exposition a rassemblé des œuvres provenant d'Europe, d'Asie et des États-Unis. Le portrait de Manet n'a jamais fait l'objet d'une exposition, bien qu'il représente environ la moitié de sa production artistique. Il a peint sa famille, ses amis et les personnalités littéraires, politiques et artistiques de l'époque, donnant vie non seulement à ses sujets mais aussi à la société parisienne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Le curieux monde de Hieronymus Bosch
programme.desc: La ville natale de Bosch aux Pays-Bas ne possède pas de tableaux du peintre et pourtant, pour la grande exposition « Visions of Genius » qui a eu lieu à l’anniversaire de sa mort en 2016, le musée Noordbrabants a réussi à réunir la presque totalité des tableaux et dessins de Bosch. C’est en 2008 que le directeur du musée a commencé sa tournée dans les plus grands musées d’Europe et Etats-Unis pour en persuader les directeurs de prêter au musée Noordbrabants leurs œuvres, en échange d’un travail d’analyse et de recherche sur les tableaux en prêt. Ainsi « Hieronymus Bosch. Visions of Genius » a été l’exposition la plus ambitieuse dédiée au peintre hollandais. Ce documentaire sera une plongée dans l’univers étrange et visionnaire de Hieronymus Bosch.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cézanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and won't miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: This gallery was built in the 16th century as the seat for Florence’s new administrative offices (uffizi), and opened to the public as the Uffizi Gallery in the 18th century. Today it still offers the world’s most beautiful collection of Italian Renaissance art. How could anyone remain insensitive to the sensual beauty of “The Birth of Venus” by Botticelli, “The Venus of Urbino” by Titian, or Correggio’s “Danae”? Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les légendes de la scène et de l'écran, Charles Dance et Geraldine James, rejoignent les experts en antiquités Natasha Raskin et Will Axon pour cette excursion dans le Wiltshire.Charles trouve une paire de vases en argent de l'époque édouardienne qu'il espère rentabiliser lors d'une vente aux enchères dans l'Essex. Geraldine, elle, tombe sur un homme dans la rue avec un secrétaire Empire français du XIXe siècle. Il lui en coûte une petite fortune - le pari sera-t-il gagnant ?Charles se retrouve dans le cockpit d'un très vieil hélicoptère tandis que Geraldine apprend comment un petit quartier de Swindon datant de 170 ans a influencé la création du NHS moderne.

programme.title: Masterpieces Unveiled
programme.desc: During the 20th century, the fame of the ‘Mona Lisa’ spread, establishing itself as the most iconic and recognisable painting of all time. It has been exploited in every sphere of culture and advertising, to the extent that its status as a pop icon has almost overshadowed its artistic value and historical significance. But if we consider Leonardo’s achievements as a pioneering craftsman and the unprecedented qualities of this work, the ‘Mona Lisa’ truly marked a turning point in portraiture. A masterpiece that set new standards in its day and which, five hundred years later, has become the very symbol of art.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Grégoire Lacroix, director of the antique decents department of the auction house, Aguttes. We meet him at the Hôtel Drouot in Paris, the largest auction house in the world. For several months, he has been working on two important sales and we are going to accompany him during the last hours of preparations.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: A l'époque des fastes, Coorte passait des heures à travailler sur ses natures mortes austères composées d'une botte d'asperges, de trois pêches ou d'un bol de fraises. Comment se fait-il qu'il faille huit couleurs différentes pour approcher le blanc des asperges de Coorte ? Et pourquoi sont-elles si transparentes ? La recherche des réponses conduit l'équipe dans une petite église et chez un cultivateur d'asperges dans les provinces néerlandaises, ce qui conduit à une découverte spéciale dans un laboratoire de chimie.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cézanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and won't miss a single detail.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Lucian Freud, l'un des peintres britanniques les plus célèbres de notre époque, est également l'un des rares artistes du XXe siècle à s'être représenté dans un autoportrait avec une telle constance. Ses autoportraits donnent un aperçu fascinant à la fois de sa personnalité et de son évolution en tant que peintre, depuis son premier portrait peint en 1939 jusqu'au dernier. Grâce à des entretiens fascinants avec d'anciens modèles, des amis et d'éminents experts, ce documentaire intensément captivant révèle l'œuvre d'un maître qui représente une étude captivante sur la dynamique du vieillissement et le processus d'autoreprésentation.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vincent Van Gogh : une nouvelle façon de voir
programme.desc: La vie de Vincent van Gogh reste entourée de mystère : folie, maladie, suicide, les ingrédients pour créer un mythe sont tous réunis. Bénéficiant d’un accès complet et sans précédent aux trésors du Van Gogh Museum d’Amsterdam, ce documentaire met en lumière à la fois l’un des artistes préférés du monde et la collection riche et unique du musée. Découvrez ces merveilleux chefs-d’œuvre sur grand écran pendant que quelques invités y compris les conservateurs de renommée mondiale et des historiens de l’art offrent leurs interprétations et des explications sur le travail de Van Gogh.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Top Italian cooks Antonio Carluccio and Gennaro Contraldo are on a Road Trip around East Anglia. Restaurateurs, writers and old friends the ‘greedy Italians’ will be foraging for antiques in the company of experts David Harper and James Braxton. Watch out for some ‘explosive’ bargaining and an extremely tasty risotto! When he’s not shopping Antonio learns about the brave fisherman of Suffolk who saved mariners’ lives while risking their own. And, Gennaro has a trip to take a peek at a very special bird.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet Julien Pitinome, photo reporter and co-founder of the Œil collective. The members of this collective consider that they have a social vision of photography and that they must be able to give a voice to those who no longer have it or who do not have it.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to the discovery of the exhibition " Split air – Bamboo art in Japan " at the Quai Branly Jacques Chirac Museum. Bamboo art in Japan appeared quite late but continues today thanks to contemporary artists. Throughout this exhibition we will be able to observe works from different periods of this movement.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the "Caravaggio" exhibition at the Jacquemart André Museum in Paris.This is the first exhibition of the artist in Paris since 1965 and includes some of his masterpieces such as "Judith Beheading Holofernes". This provocative Italian painter was a still life specialist and this is what we will see in works such as "The Lute Player".

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Wim Delvoye" at the Royal Museum of Fine Arts of Belgium in Brussels. This exhibition tries to represent the works of the artist Wim Delvoye as well as possible. You will be able to observe emblematic works of the artist such as "the tattooed pig".

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Depuis 5 ans, l'équipe de Masterpiece se fait prier pour réaliser une reconstitution de la célèbre œuvre 'La Tour de Babel' de Pieter Bruegel l'Ancien. En raison de sa complexité et de sa taille (avec environ 1033 personnages sur pas moins de 9 doubles étages), ils n'ont jamais osé. Mais cette année, l'équipe a relevé le gant et est parvenue à ses fins, grâce à son extrême persévérance.

programme.title: Art contest
programme.desc: With just one subject and 45 minutes on the clock, four artists go head-to-head in a public showdown of creativity. In the heart of Le Havre, they must create a unique artwork on the spot, turning a simple theme into a masterpiece. Will they rise to the challenge or crumble under pressure?

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Le collectionneur danois : de Delacroix à Gauguin
programme.desc: Wilhelm Hansen fut un homme d’affaires visionnaire, qui vécut au Danemark au XIXème siècle. Il fut l’un des rares collectionneurs à s’intéresser aux peintres impressionnistes, à une époque où ils étaient attaqués et dénigrés. Le film nous amène dans la maison d’été de Hansen dans la banlieue de Copenhague et nous fait visiter l’extraordinaire exposition à la Royal Academy de Londres consacrée à sa collection.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: David Hockney à la Royal Academy of Arts
programme.desc: David Hockney, généralement considéré comme l’un des artistes britanniques les plus populaires, connaît un succès mondial grâce à ses expositions à Londres, New York, Paris et ailleurs qui attirent des millions de spectateurs. Devenu récemment octogénaire, Hockney ne semble pas avoir l’intention de lever le pied ni de perdre son audace légendaire. Ce film révèle des interviews intimes et inédites et se concentre sur deux expositions à succès ayant eu lieu en 2012 et 2016 à la Royal Academy of Arts Londres. Le réalisateur Phil Grabsky a bénéficié d’un accès privilégié pour célébrer sur grand écran ce génie créatif du XXIe siècle.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Les impressionnistes - et l'homme qui les a créés
programme.desc: Ce sont les artistes les plus populaires du monde. Les œuvres de Cézanne, Monet, Degas et leurs compatriotes représentent des richesses inestimables. Mais qui étaient-ils vraiment ? Comment et pourquoi ont-ils révolutionné l’histoire de l’art ? Qu’est-ce qui se cache derrière leur succès intemporel ? Pour répondre à ces questions, le documentaire a obtenu un accès unique à une grande exposition mettant l’accent sur le collectionneur d’art parisien du 19ème siècle, Paul Durand-Ruel, l’expert des Impressionnistes qui prit la décision courageuse d’exposer les Impressionnistes à New York en 1886 et ainsi introduire la société américaine à la peinture française moderne.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: British Museum is a museum of human history and culture, located in London, United Kingdom. It contains over seven million of the world's most important objects.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Museo del Prado in Madrid holds one of the biggest collections of paintings in the world. The “Garden of Delights”, a triptych by Hieronymus Bosch, is one of its jewels. But naturally it is the Spanish School which predominates, with masterpieces by Velasquez and Goya. Look at Velasquez’s famous “Las Meninas” in which the painter portrays himself next to the Infanta and her followers. And admire the sensuous beauty of Goya’s “La Maja Desnuda” or the political force of “El Tres de Mayo”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedy legend Jennifer Saunders and best pal, top actress Patricia Potter take to the road on a humdinger of a trip. Joined by veteran antiquers Phillip Serrell and Mark Stacey they shop in Berkshire, Hampshire and Oxfordshire before heading for an auction in Greenwich, London. Jennifer and Phil detour to hear about Fred Karno, the man credited with inventing slapstick comedy. While Patricia and Mark learn how a surgeon from Reading used his incredible sense of smell to successfully treat soldiers injured in World War One.And, Phil gets custard pied – what’s not to love?

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rock'n roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Grégoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a British painter, William Turner.You will discover his labour with London from greenwich park, child hairdo’s pilgrimage, Snow storm.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Eugene Delacroix.You will discover his labour with The barque of Dante, Portrait of Aspasie, The assassination of the bishop of liege.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana cuisine avec l'interprète du titre phare de La Reine des Neiges : Anaïs Delva. Ensemble, elles vont préparer deux recettes 100% végétariennes, philosophie adoptée par la chanteuse. Au menu : fettucini de courgettes grillées, haricots blancs au pesto et burger végétarien. Comme quoi, il est possible de se régaler avec des plats végétariens sans rester sur sa faim !

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, Luana Belmondo cuisine un poisson de la Méditerranée, le rouget. Au menu : filets de rouget avec de la purée d'avocat et des carottes au cumin, et mille-feuille de rouget avec des légumes printaniers.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: The Pays d'Auge is the beating heart of Normandy. Honfleur with its picturesque port, the Basilica of Lisieux, a major pilgrimage site, and the Haras du Pin, the cradle of horse breeding, illustrate the diversity of this land of traditions, where craftsmanship and gastronomy reign supreme.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Japan - Okinawa - The Purpose of Life Part I
programme.desc: We travel to the Japanese island known for having some of the oldest people on Earth. We engage with leading scientists who have identified the "Longevity Gene," offering a glimpse into the genetic factors that contribute to extended lifespans. Beyond genetics, we explore the deeply ingrained cultural practices that sustain long, fulfilling lives in Okinawa. We delve into the importance of "moai," a lifelong social network that supports residents into their golden years, and the principle of "Hara Hachi Bu," which advises eating until you're 80% full while focusing on nourishing foods. But at the core of Okinawan longevity, we find "ikigai"—a profound sense of life purpose. From practicing martial arts to active community participation, we discover that Okinawan seniors maintain a vibrant sense of purpose in various facets of life. Join us on this enlightening journey to learn how the pillars of social support, mindful eating, and a strong sense of ikigai could enhance your ow.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: Charente-Maritime is a 500-kilometer coastline that conceals an unsuspected heritage. From La Rochelle and its fortified port to the Ile de Ré and its salt marshes, to Talmont-sur-Gironde, a medieval village perched on the estuary, this region reveals itself through the tides and encounters. An immersion between maritime traditions and historical relics.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Japan - Okinawa - The Purpose of Life Part II
programme.desc: We travel to the Japanese island known for having some of the oldest people on Earth. We engage with leading scientists who have identified the "Longevity Gene," offering a glimpse into the genetic factors that contribute to extended lifespans. Beyond genetics, we explore the deeply ingrained cultural practices that sustain long, fulfilling lives in Okinawa. We delve into the importance of "moai," a lifelong social network that supports residents into their golden years, and the principle of "Hara Hachi Bu," which advises eating until you're 80% full while focusing on nourishing foods. But at the core of Okinawan longevity, we find "ikigai"—a profound sense of life purpose. From practicing martial arts to active community participation, we discover that Okinawan seniors maintain a vibrant sense of purpose in various facets of life. Join us on this enlightening journey to learn how the pillars of social support, mindful eating, and a strong sense of ikigai could enhance your ow.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: My Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... You're on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.title: Beautiful landscapes
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... You're on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Balanced Being: Open Your Hips and Strengthen Your Arms & Upper Back
programme.desc: Balanced Being is a powerful, flowing sequence that creates presence and strength. Use this practice to root down, then rise up with confidence and a centered, balanced energy. A study of complimentary opposites, this practice will challenge you to find the balance within the opposition.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, la team vous plonge dans une séance fitness à l’ancienne, fun et dynamique. On commence par un échauffement complet : chevilles, genoux, hanches, colonne… tout y passe pour préparer le corps. Ensuite, place à une série de mouvements inspirés du fitness rétro, rythmés par la musique et la bonne humeur. La coordination et le cardio sont au rendez-vous, avec une ambiance conviviale et des blagues pour garder le sourire. Un super moment à partager en famille ou entre amis, pour bouger sans pression.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Balance and Bend: Balance and Connect
programme.desc: Stand tall and find your truest state of focus and center with this balancing flow. Use the breath to align your posture and learn to experience your practice, rather than thinking it through. Asanas, the physical yoga poses, then become a practice of feeling more than a mental exercise.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: It's off for a new week of competition. But before the four amateur decorators take it in turns to battle it out with paintbrushes and nails, they have a meeting in the Brussels workshop. It's an opportunity to gauge their opponents and the first contender for the title of decorating ace. And here he is. Guillaume, 37, manager of a concept store in Brussels, sits quietly on the sofa. He's a big kid with a passion for contemporary art, which he studied for five years. And the artist of the day has his own vision of the week's theme, right at home in his bubble.

programme.title: Home training
programme.sub-title: Fais ton Sport à la Maison
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, la team vous propose un training spécial haut du corps. Après un échauffement complet — chevilles, genoux, hanches, épaules et colonne — place à des exercices dynamiques pour muscler bras, dos et abdos. Le tout dans une ambiance fun et accessible, avec des conseils pour bien respirer et bouger sans se blesser. La coordination et la mobilité sont aussi au cœur de cette séance, idéale pour réveiller le haut du corps. Un moment sportif et motivant à vivre chez soi, à tout moment de la journée.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous donne rendez-vous à Bordeaux après avoir arpenté le pays de Blaye, visité deux fois le bassin et parcouru les terres du Libournais à deux reprises, il fallait bien s’arrêter un jour dans la capitale du Bordelais ! N’y-a-t-il pas meilleure saison que le mois de septembre pour découvrir la perle d’Aquitaine, plus souvent appelée « Cité du vin » ? Julie donne rendez-vous à ces habitants pour découvrir les traditions mais aussi les projets plus récents de cette ville chargée d’Histoire et de gastronomie.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Revolve to Evolve: Twists, Balance and Hamstrings
programme.desc: A challenging and strengthening sequence, Revolve and Evolve seeks to reveal moments of relaxation in which truths can be more readily accessed. Use this sequence to detoxify, build confidence and restore a sense of balance and wellbeing to take off the mat and into the rest of your day.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: We are in the middle of the harvest season, a perfect opportunity to discover the most beautiful French vineyards.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today, it's in the restaurant business that Nathalie, this relentless businesswoman is evolving. With her husband, She has opened a chain of sushi restaurants, businesses that she runs like a charm. Nothing is left to chance for this keen decorator. In this adventure, Nathalie will be able to give free rein to her imagination as she has to completely redecorate an office on the theme of numbers and letters. So, as you can see, to win the competition, Nathalie is likely to give her rivals a run for their money.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie prend la direction de la Bourgogne pour découvrir des races anciennes de volaille réintroduites en France grâce au travail de l’éleveur Fred Ménager. Nous nous rapprocherons ensuite de l’Auvergne pour découvrir comment est attribué le fameux Label Rouge et le rôle des organismes certificateurs … car il est important de savoir ce qui atterri dans nos assiettes. Julie se rendra aussi dans la Drôme pour cuisiner de la pintade avant de se diriger vers le Périgord pour préparer un civet de dindon. Installée dans sa petite Micheline, Julie remontera ensuite vers le centre pour découvrir un étonnant fabricant de mouche qui utilise des plumes de coqs !

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Évelyne is an estate agent, but she also does interior design. Of course, she doesn't stop there. In any case, our Wonderwoman doesn't shy away, even when it comes to competition. She's like that, Évelyne, she says what she thinks, but she'll have to deal with the theme of “numbers and letters”. Our competitor has to redecorate the office of Sabine, who is far from a novice when it comes to decorating. Sabine is now a teacher, but she still has a pretty clear idea of the style she likes when it comes to interior design.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Si l’été est la saison où les légumes abondent au potager, il serait dommage de ne pas savourer ceux que les saisons plus fraîches nous offrent : potages, tourtes, potées ou gratins mettent à l’honneur des légumes de saisons, idéals pour se réchauffer. Pour débuter ce nouveau voyage, un légume qui trônait déjà sur les tables de la Grèce Antique : le salsifis que Julie cuisinera avec une drôle de tourtière…L’hiver c’est aussi la saison du chou alors direction la Champagne pour y apprendre la recette de la potée locale qui devrait remplir le ventre d’un grand nombre de convives.Ce petit tour de France nous emmènera aussi à la découverte d’orfèvres du maraîchage qui sculptent légumes et fruits d’hiver, et vous présentera différentes techniques et méthodes pour sublimer vos potagers.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: What will they think of their new interior? How many points will they award? Their score could change everything and completely overturn the current rankings. The final hope for our decorators is to be Valérie Damidot's favourite and win a bonus point. So who will win the competition? Who will walk away with €2,000 and the title of decorating ace? Today is the day of the grand final, before we see the reaction of the owners and find out their scores. Each contestant will find out what the other contestants thought of their decorating choices.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, we're off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... We'll then head to the cherry capital, Céret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... We'll cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. We'll then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, we'll discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her pastry chef friend Laurent Favre-Mot prepare desserts from our childhood. On the program: panettone in French toast, and torta della nonna with lemon cream and pine nuts, a typical Italian dessert!

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, nous allons voyager au Mexique avec les fajitas ! Un plat typique de la cuisine tex-mex. On va préparer ensemble des tortillas (galettes de maïs). Et pour la suite, des fajitas avec du poulet, des poivrons et des épices.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.sub-title: Défendre l’eau c’est défendre la vie - Partie 1
programme.desc: The oceans cover more than 70% of the Earth's surface. The sea is the largest natural environment on our planet and remains virtually unexploited. In Brittany, in the Seven Islands. Then in the Bay of Saint-Brieuc, in the middle of a sea of green algae. In Brittany, intensive agriculture has developed over the last thirty years. In New Caledonia, the coral reef is the second largest in the world and could be threatened by the construction of a nickel mine. In Normandy, in the Botanical Garden of Vauville, an extraordinary garden has plants from all over the world. Also in the Archipelago of Chausey in Normandy with the highest tides in Europe. Or the Mont Saint Michel. As a result of silting up and man-made works, the Mont was no longer an island. In Italy, in Venice, on the verge of drowning, major development work, industrialisation and tourism have upset the environment. In New Caledonia, flying over the heart of Voh is surrounded by the largest lagoon in the world. 24,000 km2 prot.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is in the heart of the Sarthe that Julie begins her new tour. Located in the Pays de la Loire region, the Sarthe department is the gateway to the French Grand Ouest. In the Haut Maine region, Le Mans is a city of art as well as a historic city, which played a decisive role in the development of the automobile. The country of Le Mans is distinguished by the diversity of its heritage, having kept in its stones the imprints of all eras. This region is notably renowned for its poulet de Loué, its capon and many other regional specialities. Let's go for a real Sarthe gourmet journey, with veal rouelles à la mancelle, roast poularde and seasonal fruit tart.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, la team vous plonge dans une séance fitness à l’ancienne, fun et dynamique. On commence par un échauffement complet : chevilles, genoux, hanches, colonne… tout y passe pour préparer le corps. Ensuite, place à une série de mouvements inspirés du fitness rétro, rythmés par la musique et la bonne humeur. La coordination et le cardio sont au rendez-vous, avec une ambiance conviviale et des blagues pour garder le sourire. Un super moment à partager en famille ou entre amis, pour bouger sans pression.

programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.sub-title: Balanced Being: Open Your Hips and Strengthen Your Arms & Upper Back

A study of complimentary opposites, this practice will challenge you to find the balance within the opposition.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: If you're a nature enthusiast and a fan of outdoor cooking, the upcoming season is perfect for barbecue enthusiasts! Our journey will take us to Aube, nestled in the heart of the Brévonnes forest, and then to the Massif des Bauges, where grilling and snow create a unique combination. Afterward, we'll explore the Libournais region, where we'll uncover cooking techniques that make use of vine shoots, which are plentiful in the area. Just a short distance from the vineyards, we'll arrive at another corner of Gironde, the Blaye region, where the cooking method remains consistent but features a distinctly local ingredient: eel.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but it's not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Bêtises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, Luana Belmondo reçoit Delphine Malachard, qui est intolérante au gluten. Ensemble, elles vont donc cuisiner des recettes sans gluten. Au menu : soufflé au chocolat et financiers à la vanille et aux fruits rouges.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo cuisine la reine des protéines végétales : la lentille. Bonne pour la santé, digeste et délicieuse, elle remplace la viande et le poisson. Nous allons préparer des galettes de lentilles corail aux épices, avec une sauce au yaourt et à la menthe. Et pour la suite, un classique de la cuisine française : une salade de lentilles vertes avec de la saucisse de Morteau.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: Gabriela goes to the Downtown Dubai Farmer's Market with chef Silvena Rowe to pick out fresh ingredients. Silvena will present her restaurant Omnia Gourmet, where you can taste delicious gluten-free vegan cuisine. Then, Gabriela will enjoy a catamaran lesson at the Sofitel in Palm Jumeirah.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: Gabriela begins her day with an intense workout on the beach at Nikki Beach Resort with Ella, her fitness trainer. She then participates in a surf lesson with Carlo and his friends, before sampling delicious Caribbean recipes with Chef Olivier Key West.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: Gabriela gets up early to head to the desert where she will take horseback riding lessons with her friend Danielle. She will then go to the Rixos The Palm to enjoy the spa and aqua fitness. She will also try the Kangoo Jumping, before tasting the Mediterranean cuisine of the restaurant El Chiringuito with the chef Diego.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: Charente-Maritime is a 500-kilometer coastline that conceals an unsuspected heritage. From La Rochelle and its fortified port to the Ile de Ré and its salt marshes, to Talmont-sur-Gironde, a medieval village perched on the estuary, this region reveals itself through the tides and encounters. An immersion between maritime traditions and historical relics.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: Gabriela enjoys her day at The Retreat Wellness Hotel. She meets with Dr. Grace for a preliminary wellness consultation. Then she tries out the wellness cuisine with Chef Pat, before taking an Eco Gulf class at the beach with her friend. She ends her day with a sunset yoga session.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: In this episode, Gabriel will start her day with some vegan cuisine. She will experience facial yoga at the Life'n'One holistic wellness center, before meeting Katrin from Active Escapes for a Wake surfing session in Dubai Marina.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Soften the Edges: Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Soften the Edges is a sequence that encourages a sense of ease in both body and breath while moving through a dynamic series of confident poses. Tap into a quality of inner peace and learn toreturn to that feeling whenever you are most challenged, on and off the mat.

programme.title: Home training
programme.sub-title: Fais ton Sport à la Maison
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, Sabrina et Guigui vous proposent une séance full body à la fois efficace et accessible. On commence avec un échauffement articulé de la tête aux pieds : chevilles, genoux, hanches, colonne, épaules, nuque… rien n’est oublié. Les mouvements sont progressifs, le ton est léger, et l’ambiance reste motivante du début à la fin. Sabrina se concentre sur le bas du corps pendant que Guigui cible le haut, pour un training vraiment complet. Une séance idéale pour renforcer l’ensemble du corps sans stress et avec le sourire !

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Bhakti Flow: Open Your Upper Back and Shoulders
programme.desc: Bhakti Flow invite à une expansion de tout votre être grâce à la pratique du bhakti, la dévotion. Cet enchaînement allie équilibre et force, tout en attirant l’attention sur les zones du corps où la tension se dissimule, souvent ignorées. Apprenez à donner de l’espace à votre respiration et laissez-vous porter par le déroulement de la séquence.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: On this second day of competition, Nancy enters the arena. At 41, this mother of two is a real fighter. Nancy's dream came true when she gave up her office life to set up her own furniture upholstery business. And since then, there's been no stopping her. A true self-taught craftswoman, Nancy handles pumice paper and patina like no one else. She’ll have to decorate a room on the theme "well in one's bubble". Her competitors would do well to watch out, because she's not the type to put her hands in her pockets.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd'hui c'est sur la route des champignons que Julie nous embarque. Rien de mieux pour occuper ses week-ends qu’une balade en forêt à la recherche de champignons comestibles. Certaines espèces, comme le cèpe ou la girolle, se conservent très bien au congélateur ou, pour les plus patients, en bocaux. Nous aurons également l'occasion de rencontrer deux Chefs passionnés par les champignons, devenus des spécialistes du sujet : Franck Quinton et Régis Marcon. Mais pour l’instant on prend la route, à la découverte de plats typiquement français avec d’étonnants champignons de Paris en Touraine, des morilles dans le Jura, des cèpes en Gironde, des russules charbonnières en Normandie et des coulemelles en Auvergne !

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie reprend la route à bord de sa petite voiture rouge pour faire honneur à l’un de ses fruits favoris : la châtaigne. Julie ira à la rencontre de plusieurs producteurs en Ardèche, cuisinera la soupe traditionnelle de la région aux côtés de la pétillante Marithé. Elle fera aussi la recette des marrons glacés maison, avant de filer en Corse pour travailler la farine de châtaignes et les feuilles de son arbre. Ce périple s’achèvera comme toujours avec une recette de chef astucieuse et cette-fois ce sera Claude Brioude qui s’y collera ! Ce chef aime bousculer les codes et travaillera la châtaigne avec le poisson, deux produits de saison que l’on n’a pas forcément l’habitude de marier.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is a mushroom that we are going to focus on today. A mushroom, or a black diamond, some would say: the truffle.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, les plus gourmands ne devraient pas être déçus puisque c’est le chocolat qui est mis à l’honneur. Découvert par les mayas il y 2500 ans et plus largement ensuite par les Aztèques, le chocolat fait partie aujourd’hui des produits préférés des français. Et qu’on ne s’y trompe pas : au même titre que la cuisine a ses grands chef, le chocolat a aussi ses grands chocolatiers. Coté recettes, Julie fera découvrir un gâteau qu’on ne fait qu’à Saint Émilien et qui associe le chocolat au macaron, avant de rejoindre le Pays Basque pour un dessert qui ne manque pas de piment. Nous grimperons ensuite en montagne à la rencontre d’une cuisinière d’origine suisse qui fait des pains au chocolat à sa façon. Enfin, vous verrez que le chocolat nous réserve de nombreuses surprises : il possède de nombreuses vertus et s’utilise aussi pour le bien être.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: This week, it is 80 kms from the capital, in Fontainebleau, that Julie is putting down her bags. Fontainebleau, a name famous throughout the world, a magical name which evokes for some a forest, for others a castle, a name which still shines with its royal history. The forest of Fontainebleau has inspired the art world since the beginning of the 19th century. Landscape painters such as Corot and Millet drew inspiration for their works there. But Fontainebleau has many other treasures in its bag, and gastronomy is part of its heritage. This is what Julie will discover through three recipes: Quail with grapes, raspberry and poppy pie and crayfish grave.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana cuisine avec l'interprète du titre phare de La Reine des Neiges : Anaïs Delva. Ensemble, elles vont préparer deux recettes 100% végétariennes, philosophie adoptée par la chanteuse. Au menu : fettucini de courgettes grillées, haricots blancs au pesto et burger végétarien. Comme quoi, il est possible de se régaler avec des plats végétariens sans rester sur sa faim !

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, Luana Belmondo cuisine un poisson de la Méditerranée, le rouget. Au menu : filets de rouget avec de la purée d'avocat et des carottes au cumin, et mille-feuille de rouget avec des légumes printaniers.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: We end up at Yellowstone National Park in the United States, it is located in the first natural park created in the world. In Peru, the Amazon rainforest is suffering from massive deforestation. The desert on Beijing's doorstep is regularly hit by sandstorms. Some experts predict that the Chinese capital could be threatened by deserts within a hundred years. In Montana, American agricultural productivity has an ecological and human cost. Engineer Marc Dufumier explains how mechanisation is undermining the natural balance. In Brazil, agrofuels have made it possible to reduce dependence on oil, cut urban air pollution and even limit greenhouse gas emissions. In Los Angeles, human activities have disrupted the greenhouse effect and exacerbated it. Today, the Earth is heating up.

programme.title: Home training
programme.sub-title: Fais ton Sport à la Maison
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, Sabrina et Guigui vous proposent une séance full body à la fois efficace et accessible. programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, Luana Belmondo reçoit son amie Séverine Ferrer, animatrice et comédienne, pour préparer des tartes. Au menu : le gâteau patate (spécialité réunionnaise avec de la patate douce) et une tarte "Luarraine

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cette épisode, Luana Belmondo reçoit son amie Suzie Palatin pour préparer de la cuisine antillaise. Au menu : colombo de poulet, en en dessert, un blanc-manger au coco.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Tendre et savoureux, l’agneau tient une place prépondérante dans la cuisine festive mais aussi dans celle de tous les jours. Du Pays Basque au Cotentin en passant par Paris, Julie part donc sur les routes de France à la découverte des différentes races et types d'élevage existant à travers le pays. Il faut dire que la France a l'une des productions les plus variées au monde. Il existe plus d'une quarantaine de races répertoriées en 5 catégories : précoces, d’herbage, rustiques, mérinos et laitières. Mais plus qu’à la race, c’est à la façon dont ils sont alimentés qui intéresse les fins connaisseurs. Julie nous fait découvrir ses producteurs et cuisiniers de ce met raffiné !

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: Gabriela begins her day with an intense workout on the beach at Nikki Beach Resort with Ella, her fitness trainer. She then participates in a surf lesson with Carlo and his friends, before sampling delicious Caribbean recipes with Chef Olivier Key West.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C’est à nouveau sur les routes de France que l’on retrouve aujourd’hui Julie pour parler d’un produit incontournable des tables françaises : le fromage. Plus qu’un engouement gourmand, plus qu’une friandise de fins de repas, le fromage est associé à l’image de la gastronomie française, et d’ailleurs reconnu patrimoine immatériel par l’UNESCO. Les français ne s’y sont pas trompés : avec près de 1 000 variétés - des pâtes molles, aux pâtes cuites, persillées, ou encore pressées, et avec 45 Appellations, nous sommes les plus gros consommateurs de fromage au monde !

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: Gabriela enjoys her day at The Retreat Wellness Hotel. She meets with Dr. Grace for a preliminary wellness consultation. Then she tries out the wellness cuisine with Chef Pat, before taking an Eco Gulf class at the beach with her friend. She ends her day with a sunset yoga session.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes you through the Pyrénées Orientales, then Corsica, before making a stop on the Côte d'Azur, and concludes her journey between Rungis and Paris... all to explore the world of citrus fruits! These fruits add flavor, zest, and seasoning to any recipe, making them indispensable in the kitchen. They bring the warmth and sunshine of the South of France and the exoticism of distant lands. While we're all familiar with lemons, clementines, and grapefruits, Julie introduces us to a thousand other varieties.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: Nord i Argentina finnes Ibera-reservatet med sumper, laguner og et like stort biologisk mangfold som i Pantanal.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: Hvaler, pingviner og sjøløver, som føder unger her, er blant sjødyrene som tiltrekkes av Argentinas 5000 km lange kyststripe. Fra første åndedrag er det én ting som gjelder for ungene: å overleve. Spekkhuggere jakter på unge sjøløver med en spesiell teknikk, mens måker angriper hvalungene. Vi får se dyrenes utrolige adferd gjennom noen fantastiske opptak under vann, noe som gjør Christian Baumasters film til en stor visuell opplevelse.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: I Argentinas fantastiske, men tøffe villmark må dyrene kjempe for å overleve hver eneste dag. Terrenget er karrig og ulendt, lufta er tynn og været kan endre seg på et blunk. En puma sniker seg gjennom dalføret på jakt etter en guanako, mens en tarantell forsvarer seg mot et sultent beltedyr. Revene spiser av byttene de finner inntil en stor rovfugl dukker opp. Samtidig holder isbreene på ferskvannet som dyrene så sårt trenger.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Dr. Ferguson og Dr. Hodges samarbeider for å redde en kaninunge som har blitt angrepet av familiens katt; legene utfører et keisersnitt på en bulldogg, og sykehuset yrer av aktivitet mens alle hjelper til med å gjenopplive valpene.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Vi reiser fra sør til nord og utforsker de fjerneste avkrokene til Appalachian Trail og møter forskerne som jobber for å bevare området.

programme.title: Dragenes hemmeligheter
programme.desc: Selv om den er et av verdens mest utrolige dyr, er det mye ved komodovaranen som fortsatt er et mysterium. Vi går inn i disse utrolige skapningenes ville verden, og avslører hvordan spesialferdighetene deres og de unike fysiske karakteristikkene lar dem bekjempe rovdyr som er ti ganger større enn dem.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Vi følger med JT Reynolds, Death Valleys store forkjemper, for å møte forskerne som jobber for å bevare det unike stedet.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Canyonlands er en ukjent perle blant USAs nasjonalparker. Det ulendte terrenget er ikke bare vakkert, men også en historiebok.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Ulvene er et av verdens dyktigste rovdyr, og vi ser på hvordan de samarbeider for å finne, isolere og drepe store dyr som bison og moskusokser. Vi følger en arktisk ulveflokk og ser på hvordan de forbereder seg på å drepe før den tøffe vinteren setter in. Lenger sør angriper de grå ulvene bytter som er ti ganger større enn dem selv.

programme.title: Afrikas jegere
programme.desc: Løveungen Milo er en del av Mwambaflokken som regjerer i territoriet på vestsiden av Luangwaelva. De styres av tre brødre og er den største flokken på mils omkrets, så Milo får en god start på livet. I løvenes samfunn er det ungene som holder flokken samlet.

programme.title: Afrikas jegere
programme.desc: Vi følger en spesiell løveunge som har hatt en tøff oppvekst. Han ble mobbet av storebrødrene og avvist av moren, men den unge løven har nå blitt tenåring.

programme.title: Afrikas jegere
programme.desc: Møt den forkjælede, unge hunnleoparden Chipadzua, som aldri har måttet jakte for å få mat, takket være hennes tålmodige mor. Vil hun utvikle egenskapene som trengs for å overleve når hun nå for første gang er alene i livet?

programme.title: Dragenes hemmeligheter
programme.desc: Selv om den er et av verdens mest utrolige dyr, er det mye ved komodovaranen som fortsatt er et mysterium. programme.title: Alaskas farligste
programme.desc: I Alaska finner vi noen av USAs farligste dyr. Når vinteren er over, finner kjøtteterne fram til elvene og slettene for å få mest mulig sol.

programme.desc: I Alaska finner vi noen av USAs farligste dyr. Når vinteren er over, finner kjøtteterne fram til elvene og slettene for å få mest mulig sol.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Vi ser nærmere på overlevelsesevnene til noen av de sterkeste rovdyrene i verden – isbjørner. Følg livene til en mor som sliter med å skaffe mat til de to ungene sine og en ung hann som holder på å sulte ihjel. Vi ser på taktikken disse dyrene bruker for å spore opp, forfølge og angripe bytter som sel, hval og valross.
